raw_text: I am very disappointed with Blinkit's return and replacement policy for clothing items. I ordered a raincoat worth ₹700 in size L, but it turned out to be slightly smaller than expected. When I contacted support, I was informed that there is no replacement or exchange option available. For clothing products, size issues are common, and customers should have the option to exchange for a different size. Now I am stuck with a ₹700 raincoat that doesn't fit properly and cannot be used comfortably.

everything about this app is good and ofcourse it makes a very difference between our grocery shopping and makes it way more easy to shop and two things which we didn't liked and thought of reviewing it were many things go out of stock which in shop are easily available and they take a lot of service charges and handling charges...

I am rerating again, I had rated it 1 star earlier but now I am seeing some changes, still some things are bad.And the solution is a refund, which is fine. But if I order emergency cooking supplies and they turn out to be defective, what good is a refund? Cooking problems are inevitable. And to the point where I've had to cancel a recipe more than halfway through cooking and cook something else.

Ordered twice and both time the product came faulty. The support staff Sakshi literally closed the chat in middle of the conversation rudely when requested for replacement or refund. Ordered mouse, it stopped working after 2 weeks and then ordered Keyboard - it never worked. Trust me - they are selling First copy products, not worth buying anything from here

I ordered 3 Green Lettuce items, but none were delivered. After contacting customer support, I was informed that 2 units would be redelivered and 1 unit would be refunded. I accepted this resolution based on the assurance provided by your team.However, the redelivery was later cancelled from your end,and I never received the replacement items. When I followed up regarding the refund, I was told there was no pending refund because the issue had been marked as a redelivery order. very disappointed

Very Poor quality app. don't buy anything from blinkit I ordered power bank it's not working properly I tried for replacement at that time it's asking for some photo or video of product when I tried to take that getting black screen not able to return that product also there no any customer support like flipkart amazon.

New Review: Pros 1. Maintains good delivery time. 2. many set of items are available. Cons 1. at times the items being sent are not of good quality. at times items packaging is not in good condition due to storage. this has happened with me multiple times. so my say - you must work harder on maintaining the quality items only and discarding not so good items rather than delivering them to customers. plus work on improving the storages. 2. should keep delivery charge but remove platform and other

they sell near expiry spoilt items, when I called cs they asked me to contact the next day stating that the store was closed. and on the next day they said partner is not available, this went on for a couple of days untill the return window clos d now they are saying they are not able to do anything. Blinkit is the worst quickcommerce platform. now iam at a loss.

I ordered Imported Lays Stax Sour cream and Onion chips because in the image the ingredients included sunflower oil and other good ingredients but I got the chips with palmolein. False information on images and ingredients are different too. Very poor experience and very disappointing. This was not expected to get the same product with different ingredients.

"Great service! My order was delivered very quickly, and all the items were fresh and well-packed. The app is easy to use, and the delivery partners are polite and professional. Very convenient for last-minute grocery needs. Highly recommended!"

very bad app, I ordered a few items and didn't receive one of them around night time so went to customer support to complaint about it they told me after 7pm they can't help contact in working hours from 9am to 7pm, so I did even mailed them but all they said is we can't help when I asked for a refund for the item told me they can't do it because they don't have its record for I haven't received anything problem not solved they won't even share any supports contact to talk, hence don't use it

I hate the way kept silence when I asked for a refund of a product. Actually the case was, they only have left 2 pieces of the product but they didn't reduced amount accordingly but took the delivery back without refund. I'm really disappointed with this. Hence, I'm unable to rate more than one star..

payment issue, shows payment transaction fail, when doing repayment, they again booked previous order for delivery, when canceling my order they deduct ₹20/- and issue a coupon for my balance amount,.. This is a very wrong treatment... due to blinkit payment failed, why all the charges have to bear by the customer.

Guys never ordered from blinkit. Today is the first time that I used blinkit to buy 10 one piece limited edition kitkat and they deliver me plain looking kitkat. When I asked to return or exchange them. they shameful say sorry we cannot do it , it is out of stock . like what you guys think that my money is growing on trees or something. If limited editions kitkat are out of stock than why are you guys not mentioned that in your app. It a total fraud , wastage of your time and money.

Products sent are costly and often found defective. i would not recommend this app if u can buy products on nearby stores. Perishable goods like fruits and vegetables are not upto mark and are defective. blinkit stores should check the quality of goods they supply. I am very much disappointed and will not buy such goods again on such apps.

Very Bad experience on 1st order While placing the order, I had already paid the full amount through PhonePe. However, your delivery boy, Sahil Bodade, took the payment again while delivering the order — ₹340 through Google Pay. Payment for the same order has been taken twice. Please look into this matter and refund my money. We have screenshots as proof of the payment made to Sahil Bodade.

I recently started using Blinkit and find it convenient for small orders. However, larger orders often face packing issues. Items sometimes arrive in torn bags, groceries are poorly segregated, vegetables are mixed with dairy, and cold items packed with dry goods, affecting quality. Fragile items like bread and eggs are also at risk. Better packing—separating items properly, using stronger bags, and handling fragile products carefully—would greatly improve the experience.

bab experience from blinkit .After placing the order and making the payment, your app/website showed that the payment had failed and informed me that the refund would be processed within 3–4 days. Because of this, I made the payment again and placed the order once more.

certain products have limited numbers that can be purchased & that's inconvenient. If there's a free gift with the order then the option should be there whether the customer wants it . Chances are vegan customer won't go for meat products.

A lot of unnecessary charges levied. There are items that have 'chilled' mentioned in the description, but more than most other times they are delivered in lukewarm conditions. If you say 'these extra charges are necessary', then being true to product description is also necessary. I am not saying 'less chilled', they're lukewarm. If complained, all you do is 'return', can you return my waiting time?
